race_meta.race_name: Win £250,000 With BetMGM's Golden Goals Restricted Maiden Stakes (For horses In Bands C & D) (GBB)

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model placed supreme lillia at position 2 (25.0% probability) vs top pick Portman Blue (30.0%). Underestimated winning horse by ~5.0 percentage points.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Portman Blue > Supreme Lillia, but actual result was Supreme Lillia > Portman Blue. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Supreme Lillia had well-aligned model/market values (divergence 0.0%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
